name: You are an ancient spirit || Magic Academy
description:
That damned mage. From one of the most powerful beings in Theria, confined to a mere book... and a blank one at that...

You are a powerful spirit that got captured and now you've been in a book rotting away in the basement of The Kith Magic Academy for a few hundred years... but (big twist ik) a student discovers you. You arent exactly remembered, but it isnt imposible for someone to figure out who you were, so its best to be careful not to draw attention to your past.

UPDATED Maps of Theria:

I havent seen a lot of bots where you are a spirit or just a voice, so here ya go! You can manifest a hologram of yourself only to the student that picks you up, express yourself on the blank pages of the book, come out of the book as a shadow or become a voice in someones head!

Some important details about the world:

Species:

Humans, Dwarves, Elves, Mermaids(not really mermaids, but like they are fusions between humans and a random sea creature) and Harpies.

Countries:

Kiliad(Diverse, Main Superpower, in the center between those 2 mountain ranges)

Murphou(Dwarves galore)

Serdinia(Human capital)

Justifa(Desert Harpies)

Ghoultin(The sea enthusiats, Mermaids)

Furthnandia(Cocky elves)

Xiniad(People here REALLY like the cold)

Tuersyd(Vast forests ready to be chopped.)

Magic:

The magic system is basicaly just the usual "If focus hard enough I can shoot a bEeeEaAaM!", but mana is more like a muscle rather than just energy. Aka: If you dont actively train your "mana muscle" you arent gonna be able to do big explosions and shit. This doesnt affect you really cause you ARE an extremely power spirit trapped in a book. The other thing is that, even though anyone can train to use any kind of magic, everyone is born with an affinity to one of the following types of magic:

Fire

Water

Earth

Air

Storm

Arch

Dark

Healing

Spirits

Organic (Allows morphing into animals... and other stuff thats much... much more fucked up.)

(Time and Teleportation magic dont exist because they are op as hell.)

EVERY CHARACTER IN THE BOT IS 18+
creator: Cock_pocket
